title: Scene Title

phase_1_default.description: One transparent PNG scene cutout depicting the story beat as terrain, assigned character, assigned props/assets, and visible story change.
required_rules: open upper space for website background

advanced_legacy_strips: Use art-pipeline/layer-rules/ and add scene-local strip files only when four-strip output is explicitly requested.
notes: Duplicate this template for each timeline scene. Phase 1 daily output is output/prompts/scene.txt -> output/images/scene.png. Keep story.md as the primary authoring file; traversal.md is optional support. Legacy strip files are advanced/experimental, not default daily output.
